messages.content: # Are your traffic cars completely blue? Follow this guide!

# Step 1:

> Open Content Manager > Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > Graphics Adjustments > LOD settings 
> 
> **Disable "Skip loading first LOD for other cars entirely" **

## Warning:  
> Please do not get this confused with: <#1322260389064347794>
> -# If your traffic cars are blue triangles, please follow the above, as this FAQ will not fix your issue.
